title: Ensure good defaults on blank c/storage configuration
body:
If c/storage paths are explicitly set to "" (the empty string) it will use compiled-in defaults. However, it won't tell us this via `storage.GetDefaultStoreOptions()` - we just get the empty string (which can put our defaults, some of which are relative to c/storage, in a bad spot).

Hardcode a sane default for cases like this. Furthermore, add some sanity checks to paths, to ensure we don't use relative paths for core parts of libpod.

Fixes #3952
